detail.description:
Party Fowl is a new type of party game that you play by moving your body in crazy, wacky, and hilarious ways. Whether you’re a spring chicken or a seasoned turkey, you’ll have around the cluck fun in a series of flat-out absurd but incredibly entertaining AR mini-games. Try to best your opponent in this ultimate showdown of utter ridiculousness. 

Only the silliest shall prevail.
__


YOUR BODY IS THE CONTROLLER.

Get the party started with just your phone, tablet or PC. Party Fowl uses your dev
detail.releaseNotes:
Thank you for playing Party Fowl! We are regularly making updates to create even better motion game experiences.

This update includes bug fixes and other minor improvements.
